query:
SELECT ms.id, ms.sessionNumber, ms.sessionDate, ms.taskStatus, ms.taskMode, ms.isAssessment, ms.taskId, ms.customTaskTitle
FROM mentoring_sessions ms
JOIN alunos a ON ms.alunoId = a.id
WHERE a.name LIKE '%illena%'
ORDER BY ms.sessionNumber;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT ms.id, ms.sessionNumber, ms.sessionDate, ms.taskStatus, ms.taskMode, ms.isAssessment, ms.taskId, ms.customTaskTitle
FROM mentoring_sessions ms
JOIN alunos a ON ms.alunoId = a.id
WHERE a.name LIKE '%illena%'
ORDER BY ms.sessionNumber;
